text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ALL RIIIIGHT! I'm here! The Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hm? Trainer, you don't seem very excited...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"Face to face with all our fans
Where I can say 'Thank you'"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"I've been waiting forever
I am a flowering phantasia"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the concert song exclusive to the Tiara tour.
The winner of this year's Shuka Sho will go on to
sing it, too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, doesn't listening to it just fill you up with
strength?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It feels like it was written just for us! A princess
and her prince.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. That's right—I'm a princess! I'll beat down
any foe who dares stand in my way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And tonight, I'll sing and put on a wonderful
performance just for you.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: So expect the best from me out there, Trainer!
